raw_consumer_statement: American Express has denied my chargeback dispute twice for {$4300.00} despite my submission of a XXXX Proof of Delivery document issued by the carrier itself confirming the package was delivered to an address other than mine. I never received the item. The seller can not produce proof of delivery to my correct address. American Express has failed to conduct a reasonable investigation as required under the Fair Credit Billing Act. I am requesting CFPB intervention and reversal of this charge.. I have attached the proof of delivery to the WRONG ADDRESS!
